item.name: Auth
Register a new customer

request.description:
Creates a customer account and returns a Sanctum token usable immediately.
Requires a valid 6-digit OTP previously issued by POST /api/v1/auth/registration/send-otp
for the same email, AND a `device` payload describing the calling mobile device.
The issued token is bound to a `mobile_devices` row created in the same transaction.

response.body: {"success":true,"message":"Registration successful.","data":{"token":"1|abc...","customer":{"id":1,"name":"Bob","email":"bob@example.test","phone":"+15551112222"},"mobile_device":{"id":"5c8e...","hash":"...","platform":"android"}}}
response.name: success

response.body: {"success":false,"message":"The given data was invalid.","error":{"email":["The email has already been taken."]}}
response.name: email taken

response.body: {"success":false,"message":"The given data was invalid.","error":{"password":["The password field confirmation does not match."]}}
response.name: password mismatch

response.body: {"success":false,"message":"The given data was invalid.","error":{"otp":["The code is invalid or has expired."]}}
response.name: invalid otp

response.body: {"success":false,"message":"The given data was invalid.","error":{"device":["The device field is required."]}}
response.name: missing device

item.name: Log in a customer

request.description:
Accepts a single `identifier` field that matches against username, email, or phone.
Requires a `device` payload describing the calling mobile device — the issued
Sanctum token is bound to a `mobile_devices` row resolved (or created) by
`(customer_id, device.hash)`.

response.body: {"success":true,"message":"Login successful.","data":{"token":"1|abc...","customer":{"id":1,"name":"Bob","username":"bob","email":"bob@example.test","phone":"+15551112222"},"mobile_device":{"id":"5c8e...","name":"My Pixel","hash":"1f0a...","platform":"android","model":"Pixel 8","os_version":"14","app_version":"1.0.0","fcm_token":"cQk...","created_at":"2026-06-09T12:00:00.000000Z","updated_at":"2026-06-09T12:00:00.000000Z"}}}
response.name: success

response.body: {"success":false,"message":"The given data was invalid.","error":{"identifier":["These credentials do not match our records."]}}
response.name: invalid credentials

response.body: {"success":false,"message":"The given data was invalid.","error":{"device":["The device field is required."]}}
response.name: missing device

item.name: Request a password-reset OTP by email.

response.body: {"success":true,"message":"If that email exists, an OTP has been sent.","data":{}}
response.name: success

response.body: {"success":false,"message":"The given data was invalid.","error":{"email":["The email field is required."]}}

item.name: Resend a password-reset OTP. Invalidates any prior unconsumed OTP.

response.body: {"success":true,"message":"If that email exists, a new OTP has been sent.","data":{}}
response.name: success

item.name: Verify a password-reset OTP and exchange it for a single-use reset token.

response.body: {"success":true,"message":"OTP verified.","data":{"reset_token":"a3f9...","expires_in":600}}
response.name: success

response.body: {"success":false,"message":"The given data was invalid.","error":{"code":["The code is invalid or has expired."]}}
response.name: invalid code

item.name: Reset a customer password using a single-use reset token.

response.body: {"success":true,"message":"Password reset successfully. Please log in with your new password.","data":{}}
response.name: success

response.body: {"success":false,"message":"The given data was invalid.","error":{"reset_token":["The reset token is invalid or has expired."]}}
response.name: bad token

item.name: Log out (current device)

request.description: Revokes only the token used for this request.

item.name: Log out (all devices)

request.description: Revokes every Sanctum token for the authenticated customer.

item.name: Certificates
List certificates visible to the authenticated customer.

request.description:
Mapped customers see their mapped certificates; unmapped customers
receive the single global default. Each certificate's files are
filtered to the caller device's platform.

response.body: {"success":false,"message":"Not found.","error":{"reason":"Resource not found"}}

item.name: Download a certificate file the authenticated customer may access.

response.body: {"success":false,"message":"Not found.","error":{"reason":"Resource not found"}}

List all charging sessions for the authenticated customer, paginated.

query.description: Filter to a single owned device.

request.description: Spans every device owned by the customer. Pass `device_id` to filter to a single device.

request.description: Idempotent: re-sync with the same (device, started_at) updates ended_at + duration.

item.name: Health
Health check

request.description: Returns 200 if the API is reachable.

response.body: {"success":true,"message":"OK","data":{"status":"ok"}}
response.name: ok

item.name: Me
Update the currently-bound mobile device

request.description:
Updates mutable fields of the mobile device linked to the authenticating
Sanctum token. Returns 409 when the current token has no device link
(legacy token issued before this feature shipped — client must re-login).

The `hash` and `platform` fields are immutable. If included in the payload,
they are silently dropped — only the listed mutable fields are accepted.

response.body: {"success":true,"message":"Mobile device updated.","data":{"id":"5c8e...","name":"My Pixel","hash":"...","platform":"android"}}
response.name: success

response.body: {"success":false,"message":"Unauthenticated.","error":{"reason":"Token missing or expired"}}
response.name: missing token

response.body: {"success":false,"message":"No mobile device bound to current session.","error":{"reason":"No mobile device bound to current session."}}
response.name: legacy token
